site.name: Arco Studio
site.tagline: Custom software solutions built around your business. If you can imagine it, we can build it.
site.description: Arco Studio is a software development team specializing in modern websites and Flutter mobile applications. From concept to launch, we help clients bring their digital products to life.

services.title: Web
services.subtitle: Development
services.description: Fast, responsive websites and web apps built with modern frameworks. Landing pages, dashboards, and full-stack products tailored to your brand.

services.title: Flutter
services.subtitle: Mobile
services.description: Cross-platform iOS and Android apps from a single codebase. We handle UI, APIs, and app store deployment so you can focus on your business.

services.title: UI / UX
services.subtitle: Design
services.description: Clean interfaces and thoughtful user flows. We design experiences that look sharp on social media and convert visitors into clients.

services.title: Ongoing
services.subtitle: Support
services.description: Maintenance, updates, and feature additions after launch. Your product keeps growing without you needing to hire in-house.

process.title: Consult
process.description: We learn your goals, audience, and timeline. A short call or message thread is enough to scope the project.

process.title: Design
process.description: Wireframes and visual direction aligned with your brand. You approve before we write a line of code.

process.title: Build
process.description: Iterative development with regular check-ins. Web or Flutter — we ship in focused sprints.

process.title: Launch
process.description: Deploy, test, and hand off. We stay available for support and the next version of your product.

portfolio.title: Ridey - Car Rental App
portfolio.description: Ridey is a car rental app that allows users to rent a car from a nearby location. It is a cross-platform app built with Flutter and Dart.

portfolio.title: E-Commerce
portfolio.description: Custom e-commerce storefront with checkout, inventory sync, admin dashboard and mobile-first product pages.

portfolio.title: ERP System for a Home Cleaning Company
portfolio.description: ERP System for a Home Cleaning Company that allows users to manage their customers, orders, and inventory.

team.name: Seif Hisham
team.bio: Full-stack Software Developer. Turns client ideas into shipped products.

team.name: Ahmed Hossam
team.bio: Flutter specialist focused on performance and app store releases.

team.name: Mohammed Said
team.bio: Engineering data pipelines from scratch and analyzing the metrics that actually drive growth.

team.name: Mahmoud Ossama
team.bio: Oracle Developer specializing in building scalable ERP systems and business solutions.

testimonials.quote: Arco Studio delivered our app on time and on budget. Communication was clear every step of the way.
testimonials.author: Ramy ElSaid

testimonials.quote: Our new website looks professional and loads fast. We started getting inquiries within the first week.
testimonials.author: Shaimaa

testimonials.quote: They understood our Flutter requirements immediately and shipped a polished MVP in six weeks.
testimonials.author: Marwan ElKahky

services.intro: We build for clients who need a polished digital presence — whether that is a marketing website, a Flutter app, or both. Every project starts with clarity on scope, timeline, and budget.

process.intro: A straightforward process from first message to launch. No jargon, no surprises — just a small team focused on shipping your product.

portfolio.intro: Placeholder projects you can replace with real client work as you grow. Mix web and Flutter to show the range of what your team delivers.

team.intro: A small group of developers and designers who collaborate on client projects. Swap these placeholders with your real names and roles.

testimonials.intro: Replace these with real testimonials as you complete projects for clients.

contact.intro: Tell us about your website or Flutter app idea. We typically reply within one business day.
